description: This file defines a JobsProvider class that manages job data, including loading jobs from a database, updating their status, and simulating real-time updates with periodic timer callbacks. It uses Flutter's ChangeNotifier for state management and interacts with a database and Job models.

classes.name: JobsProvider
classes.description: A ChangeNotifier class managing a list of jobs, providing methods to load, update, and simulate real-time status updates for jobs.

methods.name: loadInitial
methods.description: Loads initial job data from the database and starts the real-time simulation timer.

methods.name: updateJobStatus
methods.description: Updates the status of a specific job identified by jobId both in local list and database.

methods.name: _startMockRealtime
methods.description: Starts a periodic timer to simulate real-time status changes in jobs.

methods.name: _next
methods.description: Determines the next job status in the simulation sequence.

methods.name: dispose
methods.description: Cancels the timer when the provider is disposed of.
